Operation 'executeCode' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic. Enhanced version specifies request parameters, batch behavior, response content, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Executes code programmatically from backend servers. Supports batch execution by passing stdin as an array of inputs, receiving an array of response objects.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute code with optional batch processing
data.description_suggestion: Executes code programmatically on OneCompiler backend servers. Accepts a code file, programming language specification, and optional stdin inputs. Supports batch execution by providing stdin as an array to receive multiple execution results. Returns execution output, errors, and status for each execution. No persistent state changes occur; executions are isolated and temporary.
